target: 22. Haine's Hometown
Ugh...
(This is… Haine's hometown…)
(…Right, where's Ushio!?)
...It cuts off up ahead. The flow of time...
Just like Dr. Hishigata said...
Time isn't... flowing here. It feels... stagnant.
It doesn't seem like we can return even if we loop... If we die, it's probably... game over...
...This is bad... Ushioooooo!!!!
No response…!!
I had a hold of her...!! With this hand...!!
Shinpei-san!!
Ryunosuke-san…!
Ushio-san... she definitely came this way.
The shotgun Ushio-san printed hasn't disappeared...!
I see...!! 50 meters!!
I can faintly sense her presence too. But... she's moving...
L-... Let's go after her!!
...Ugh!? My legs...!
Shinpei-san!! I'm sorry... because I jumped...!
I was the one who told you to catch up to Shide with all your might! Compared to Nagumo-sensei... This is nothing.
...Shinpei-san. Please leave all control of your body to me! Then I can take on the pain!
But... then you'll...!!
I'll be fine! I'm still a shadow, after all! I just have to lower the volume on my pain receptors!
...It's not just the leg injury. Shinpei-san's physical body is starting to break down.
If I don't support you from the inside, Shinpei-san, a human, won't be able to survive in this place.
How is it? I'll be moving from here on out.
(Am I... just a consciousness now...?)
(It feels... kinda weird...)
(My body's senses are paralyzed and I can't feel anything... but my thoughts are crystal clear...)
I'm usually like this too, but it feels gross if you're not used to it, doesn't it.
(Yes... but well... I think I can manage it the same way I do when I look at the big picture.)
(Then, please take care of my body. First, let's look for Ushio.)
Right. We don't have time to be taking it easy.
Ushio-saaaaan!! Please answerrrrrr!!
(Ryunosuke-san. Is this Hitogashima?)
It looks similar, doesn't it... Across the sea... you can even see the Wakayama mainland...
Also... there's a sweet smell... Is this...
(Mikan oranges...?)
...Assuming this is Mt. Takanosu... Were there this many mikan trees... growing here...?
I'm... thirsty...
(...Don't do it!! Ryunosuke-san!! This is Yomotsuhegui!!)
Hah!
It's... not a mikan...!?
Ugh!? It smells like raw meat...!
Yomotsuhegui... The thing that appears in my sister's book, right?
(Yes!)
(If you eat food from the underworld, you won't be able to return to the living world...)
Something was wrong with me... T-To think something like that looked delicious...
(No... it might be because you're a shadow, Ryunosuke-san... that it had some kind of effect on you.)
Um... Shinpei-san. I've been meaning to say this for a while.
(What is it...?)
You don't have to use polite speech with me!
(Huh?)
I mean, you're older than me, Shinpei-san!
(No, no! You're the same age as Nagumo-sensei, right, Ryunosuke-san? You're my senior!!)
No, no, no! I was a 3rd year in middle school when I died! Ushio-san called me "Ryu-kun!" right away!
(That's just because Ushio is a communication monster...)
(I'm not the sporty type, and I can't just act overly familiar just because someone is my junior...)
Do you use polite speech with everyone?
(Yes... I'm fine with people my own age, though.)
Ehhh. Then what about Mio-san? You spoke casually with her, right?
(That took a lot of time too...)
Hmmm... I'm kinda frustrated...
Then I'll use casual speech from here on out!!
So it's okay for you to use casual speech too, Shinpei!! We're of one body and soul now, so let's get along!!
(This is... Polite speech is my way of showing respect, so...)
(I don't think using casual speech means you're definitely close, and just because it's polite speech doesn't mean it's distant.)
No!!! Form is important for these things!! I'll use casual speech... I'm gonna use it!!
(Hehe...)
Is something funny!?
(No, I just want to know more. About "Ryu-kun".)
Really!?
(Wait... something's dropped on the ground. Is that!?)
…Ball?
(I recognize it...)
(That's... the temari I saw in Nagumo-sensei's memory, Haine's temari!!)
Ah! The temari is...!
(Even though there's no slope, it's rolling...)
(It's almost as if it's being drawn to something...)
(Let's chase after it!!)
Roger!!
(…Ryunosuke-san! Look at that sign!!)
This is... tore... s?
(Tore S... Wakayabo Ko)
No, it's backwards! Kobayakawa... Store...!?
Hah!
Wh-What are these guys!?
(Shadows…?)
I don't know... But... they don't seem like they're going to attack.
(The temari is rolling away! It's close!! Ushio's presence is...!!)
…Ah!?
Ushio-san!!!!!
Ushio!!
Pull yourself together!! What happened!?
Ugh, guh... Shin... pei... Ah... my head is...
What the...!? Something is coming from Ushio's shadow...!!?
This presence is... Haine!!?
N-No way...!? Is she losing her sense of self and trying to revert to Haine!?
Aahhh...
...I see... my sister said this!!
Ushio-san's mud was torn off from Haine... Even if it's overwritten with "Ushio", it's originally a part of Haine!
It wouldn't be strange if Ushio-san's ego disappeared and Haine appeared at any time...!
When that happens... I'll do it instead of my sister...!!
…Shinpei, I'll shoot!!
Ugh... Aaaaaah...!!!!
I'm shooting!!! Ready!?
Wait, Ryunosuke-kun!! She's saying something!!
...Hah... Hah... I'm... fine...
...I'm fine now... Ryu-kun...!!
This child is different... She's not the bad Haine who killed Ryu-kun!
Huh!?
...What do you mean!?
Back then, 14 years ago... Haine's ego split.
It split into the human girl "<color=#GF_TIPS_022>Haine</color>" and "Hiruko"...
The one who killed Shiori-chan and Ushio wasn't this child.
The one who killed them was "Hiruko"...!!
...Then who's inside Ushio-san right now!?
A girl who loves sweets... Nagumo-sensei's friend...
...My sister's...
Yeah... and... This child is... me...
Haine says she wants to talk... Will you listen to her...?
…Yes.
Thank you.
…Nice to meet you…
You're...
You don't have to be scared!! Everyone here is Hizuru-san's friend!!
…Hm…
I was having a long dream... Those were Ushio's memories... I believe I understand what is happening...
I'm sorry, Shinpei... Ryunosuke... Because you got involved with someone like me...
Ryunosuke, Hizuru... and Ushio... They all died...
...It's not something you should apologize for. The one who ate me was Hiruko, and that's just the kind of creature she is...
The bad one is Shide, who's using her...!!
...You're going to fight, right? With Shide-sama...
This is "Tokoyo"... A world that exists above the physical world we live in...
(...Above? Does that mean... the fourth dimension...)
I still have a part of Hiruko-sama's memories left in me... So there are things I can tell you.
In Tokoyo, time doesn't move forward. Shinpei... Ushio... you two should be able to see it, right? The stagnation of time...
Yeah…!!
Now look at Ryunosuke with those eyes.
...Ah!! Ryunosuke's body... isn't out of sync!!
You're right... He's been talking normally this whole time...
(So this is Shide's goal...!!)
(Since there's no before or after in time, looping is impossible, and the "next two seconds" don't exist either!!)
He's trying to steal Ushio's eye here...
Whoever possesses that awakened eye will reach a dimension one level "above" the real world.
Once that happens, all time and space in the real world will be at his mercy.
Whoa!!
Seriously!? It doesn't feel like I can do anything like that at all!
(So it's like how a 3D person can easily hold, flip, or burn a 2D comic book...)
It seems unstable since it's just awakened... Besides, this is Tokoyo...
That eye is just a normal eye here... It will only show its true power in the real world.
The ending…
The thought that jumped into my head when I scanned inside Shide...
He intends to kill the world. Just *click*, like turning off a game console.
There will be no world after that... The true... end...
What!?
...Th-This sound is...!!
